headline: Romelu Lukaku
body: Two iconic Everton No.10s – past and present – face off tonight as Romelu Lukaku’s Belgium take on Iliman Ndiaye’s Senegal. 🇧🇪🇸🇳 Let us know your favourite ever Toffees No.10… 🔵
